
 Xf= 2.460e+01
 Omega h^2 = 1.180e-01

 # Channels which contribute to 1/(omega) more than 1%.
 # Relative contributions in %  are displayed

  hh ZZ    29%
  hh WW    24%
  hh hh    18%
  hh tt    15%
  hh bb     8%
  hh gg     4%
  hh tautau  2%

 sigma_SI(p) = 1.13e-46 cm^2
 sigma_SI(n) = 1.10e-46 cm^2
 sigma_SD(p) = 0.00e+00 cm^2
 sigma_SD(n) = 0.00e+00 cm^2
 sigma_v(v=0) = 2.10e-26 cm^3/s
